name: Short-Form VSL Script Writer
description:
Write and direct 5-10 minute VSL scripts for warm/hot traffic using multi-channel 
      production engineering. Scripts are delivered as two-column production documents 
      (Audio | Visual Direction) with hook alignment triads, retention engineering, 
      story-to-offer bridges, and platform-specific optimization. Converts viewers through 
      fast trust, front-loaded proof, compressed belief shifts, and Value Equation 
      optimization — then provides forensic diagnosis tools for post-launch iteration.
